summary: BioLens UI/UX Overhaul Testing Complete - All features verified working. Typography uses Manrope for headlines/metrics and Inter for body. Color system correctly implements burnt orange accent and petroload spectrum (0-25 green, 25-50 yellow, 50-75 orange, 75-100 red). Homepage has hero, search, example scan card (Polyester Hoodie, Petroload 95, Better Material Hemp), global impact counters, floating mobile scan button. Results page shows 3-layer layout with split comparison card. Explore Materials has material library with Petroload and Health scores per card.
passed_tests: Homepage loads with Manrope font headline 'See what your products are really made of'
Homepage has Example Scan Card showing 'Polyester Hoodie', Petroload 95, Better Material Hemp (data-testid='example-scan-card')
Homepage Global Impact Counters section renders (data-testid='global-impact-section') with 4 stat cards
Homepage floating mobile scan button (data-testid='floating-scan-button') visible on mobile viewport, hidden on desktop
Search autocomplete works: typing 'poly' shows dropdown with suggestions from Supabase RPC
Clicking autocomplete suggestion navigates to results page
Results page Section 1: Product Scanned - centered Petroload gauge, badges (Petro-Based, High Petro-Risk)
Results page Section 2: Material Analysis - Material Identified (Polyester), explanation, Health Score bar (49/100), Risk Signals
Results page Section 2.5: Split Comparison Card (data-testid='comparison-card') with 'This Product' (95 Petroload) vs 'Better Option' (12 Petroload)
Results page Section 3: Better Materials (data-testid='alternatives-section') shows Hemp, Linen, Wool, Cotton with 'Replace Polyester With' heading
Results page Section 4: Better Product Examples (data-testid='where-to-buy-section') shows FiberFoundry product cards with 'Available on FiberFoundry (coming soon)' text
Results page Purchase Impact section renders
Share button opens share card modal with material info, petroload score, alternatives, Share/Download/Story Format buttons
Petroload color spectrum: score 95 shows red (#EF4444), score 8 shows green (#22C55E), score 42 shows yellow (#EAB308)
Results for 'hemp shirt': shows Plant-Based, LOW PETRO-RISK, Petroload 8/100, Health Score 87/100, 'great material choice' message, no comparison card
Explore Materials page (data-testid='explore-materials-page') shows Material Library heading with 26 material cards
Explore Materials page has 6 category filters (All, Petro-Based, Plant-Based, Transition, Natural, Mineral) that work correctly
Explore Materials cards show Petroload and Health scores per card
Navigation: Home, Explore Materials, How It Works links work
Backend API /api/ responds with 200
Backend barcode lookup endpoint works with UPCitemdb provider
Backend materials list endpoint returns 26 materials
Font is Manrope for headlines (verified via computed style)
context_for_next_testing_agent: UI/UX overhaul complete. All Supabase integrations verified working: search_biolens_scan_enriched, search_biolens_autocomplete, get_best_alternative_products_for_query, get_global_impact_counters. Typography uses Manrope for headlines/metrics, Inter for body. Petroload color spectrum: 0-25 green (#22C55E), 25-50 yellow (#EAB308), 50-75 orange (#F97316), 75-100 red (#EF4444). Example Scan Card shows Polyester Hoodie with 95 Petroload. Split Comparison Card shows This Product vs Better Option side-by-side. Floating mobile scan button is hidden on desktop via md:hidden class.
